`pkg/registry/apps/alerting/rules/recordingrule/legacy_storage.go`: SQL-backed storage for recording rules via K8s API.\n   - `pkg/registry/apps/alerting/rules/recordingrule/storage.go`: Factory for recording rule legacy storage.\n   - `pkg/registry/apps/alerting/notifications/receiver/legacy_storage.go`: SQL-backed storage for notification receivers via K8s API.\n   - `pkg/registry/apps/alerting/notifications/routingtree/legacy_storage.go`: SQL-backed storage for routing tree via K8s API.\n   - `pkg/registry/apps/alerting/notifications/templategroup/legacy_storage.go`: SQL-backed storage for template groups via K8s API.\n   - `pkg/registry/apps/alerting/notifications/timeinterval/legacy_storage.go`: SQL-backed storage for time intervals via K8s API.\n   - `pkg/services/ngalert/notifier/legacy_storage/config.go`: Alertmanager config store backed by SQL (`alertmanagerConfigStoreImpl`).\n   - `pkg/services/ngalert/notifier/legacy_storage/persist.go`: Defines `AMConfigStore` interface for alertmanager config access.\n   - `pkg/services/ngalert/notifier/legacy_storage/receivers.go`: Receiver data access via SQL.\n   - `pkg/services/ngalert/notifier/legacy_storage/compat.go`: Compatibility/conversion functions between internal models and API models.\n   - `pkg/services/ngalert/notifier/legacy_storage/errors.go`: Error types for the legacy storage.\n\n4. **Migration scripts** – convert legacy (dashboard-based) alerting to unified alerting:\n   - `pkg/services/sqlstore/migrations/alert_mig.go`: Defines the original legacy alerting SQL schema (tables: `alert`, `alert_rule_tag`, `alert_notification`, `alert_notification_state`).\n   - `pkg/services/sqlstore/migrations/ualert/ualert.go`: Main migration logic (`upgradeNgAlerting`) that moves pre-8.2 alertmanager configs to per-org directories, and `FixEarlyMigration` / `updateDashboardUIDPanelIDMigration` functions for migrating dashboard alert annotation data into unified alerting.\n   - `pkg/services/sqlstore/migrations/ualert/tables.go`: Creates all unified alerting SQL tables (`alert_definition`, `alert_rule`, `alert_rule_version`, `alert_instance`, `alert_configuration`, etc.).\n   - `pkg/services/sqlstore/migrations/ualert/migration_service_migration.go`: Moves the legacy alerting migration status from the migration log table to the kvstore (`MigrationServiceMigration`).\n   - `pkg/services/sqlstore/migrations/ualert/org_upgrade_state_mig.go`: Manages org-level upgrade state between Legacy and UnifiedAlerting modes (`CreateOrgMigratedKVStoreEntries`).\n   - `pkg/services/sqlstore/migrations/ualert/alert_rule_state_table.go`: Adds the alert_rule_state table as part of the migration.\n   - `pkg/services/sqlstore/migrations/ualert/rule_group_index_migration.go`: Adds rule_group_index column to alert rules.\n   - `pkg/services/sqlstore/migrations/ualert/created_folders_mig.go`: Migration for tracking folders created during legacy alerting migration.\n\nNote: In Grafana 11+, the classic (dashboard panel-based) legacy alerting engine was completely removed. The 'legacy' terminology in the current codebase refers to the SQL-backed adapter layer for the Kubernetes-style API server (as opposed to future etcd-based unified storage), while ngalert IS the unified alerting engine."

# Grafana Legacy Alerting to Unified Alerting Migration

## Your Task

Find all Go source files in grafana/grafana that implement both the legacy alerting engine and the unified alerting (ngalert) engine: the legacy alert rule storage, the unified alert rule storage, and the migration script that converts legacy rules to unified format.

## Context

You are working on a codebase task involving repos from the migration domain.

## Available Resources

The local `/workspace/` directory contains: sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec.


## Output Format


Now let me write the final answer JSON:

The answer has been written to `/workspace/answer.json`. Here's a summary of my findings:

## Summary

This is **Grafana 12.x** (commit `26d36ec`). The classic dashboard-based "legacy alerting" engine was completely removed in Grafana 11. The codebase now uses the following structure:

### Unified Alerting (ngalert) Engine
- `pkg/services/ngalert/ngalert.go` — Main service entry point
- `pkg/services/ngalert/schedule/schedule.go` — Alert rule evaluation engine/scheduler

### Unified Alert Rule Storage (SQL-backed ngalert store)
- `pkg/services/ngalert/store/alert_rule.go` — CRUD for alert rules (`InsertAlertRules`, `GetAlertRulesForScheduling`, etc.)
- `pkg/services/ngalert/store/database.go` — `DBstore` struct + `AlertingStore` interface
- `pkg/services/ngalert/store/alertmanager.go` — Alertmanager config storage
- `pkg/services/ngalert/store/compat.go` — DB model ↔ domain model conversion

### Legacy Storage (SQL-backed Kubernetes API adapter)
In the current codebase, "legacy storage" refers to the SQL-backed implementations for the Kubernetes-style API server:
- `pkg/registry/apps/alerting/rules/alertrule/legacy_storage.go`
- `pkg/registry/apps/alerting/rules/recordingrule/legacy_storage.go`
- `pkg/registry/apps/alerting/notifications/receiver/legacy_storage.go` (+ routingtree, templategroup, timeinterval)
- `pkg/services/ngalert/notifier/legacy_storage/` — SQL-backed alertmanager config storage

### Migration Scripts (legacy → unified alerting)
- `pkg/services/sqlstore/migrations/alert_mig.go` — Legacy alert DB schema (dashboard-based alerting tables)
- `pkg/services/sqlstore/migrations/ualert/ualert.go` — Main migration (`upgradeNgAlerting`, `FixEarlyMigration`)
- `pkg/services/sqlstore/migrations/ualert/tables.go` — Creates all unified alerting tables
- `pkg/services/sqlstore/migrations/ualert/migration_service_migration.go` — Moves migration status to kvstore
- `pkg/services/sqlstore/migrations/ualert/org_upgrade_state_mig.go` — Org-level Legacy/UnifiedAlerting state tracking

# 12.2.0 (2025-09-23)

### Features and enhancements

- ** Alerting:** Add feedback buttons for the new AI helpers (Enterprise)
- **Access:** Remove plugin app access in plugin basic role seeder (Enterprise)
- **Actions:** Infinity authentication [#109493](https://github.com/grafana/grafana/pull/109493), [@adela-almasan](https://github.com/adela-almasan)
- **Alerting:** Add GMA export to the new list page [#109784](https://github.com/grafana/grafana/pull/109784), [@konrad147](https://github.com/konrad147)
- **Alerting:** Add alerting AI buttons for cloud (Enterprise)
- **Alerting:** Add contact point filter to Active Notifications page [#109775](https://github.com/grafana/grafana/pull/109775), [@alexander-akhmetov](https://github.com/alexander-akhmetov)
- **Alerting:** Add enrichment per rule extension component (Enterprise)
- **Alerting:** Add extension point link from alert rule to grafana-metricsdrilldown-app [#108566](https://github.com/grafana/grafana/pull/108566), [@bohandley](https://github.com/bohandley)
- **Alerting:** Add feature toggle and extension point [#110141](https://github.com/grafana/grafana/pull/110141), [@soniaAguilarPeiron](https://github.com/soniaAguilarPeiron)
- **Alerting:** Add keepFiringFor and missing_series_evals_to_resolve to file provisioning [#109699](https://github.com/grafana/grafana/pull/109699), [@alexander-akhmetov](https://github.com/alexander-akhmetov)
- **Alerting:** Add observability to enrichment UI (Enterprise)
- **Alerting:** Add tooltips in enrichment list for enrichment type (Enterprise)
- **Alerting:** Alert enrichment list page (Enterprise)
- **Alerting:** Allow filter by rule source in Filter V2 [#110336](https://github.com/grafana/grafana/pull/110336), [@laurenashleigh](https://github.com/laurenashleigh)
- **Alerting:** Auto refresh contact points in the rule form [#109539](https://github.com/grafana/grafana/pull/109539), [@konrad147](https://github.com/konrad147)
- **Alerting:** Check if TimeInterval is used in ActiveTimings when deleting [#110691](https://github.com/grafana/grafana/pull/110691), [@fayzal-g](https://github.com/fayzal-g)
- **Alerting:** Disable group consistency check for GMA rules [#109599](https://github.com/grafana/grafana/pull/109599), [@konrad147](https://github.com/konrad147)
- **Alerting:** Display Error Message in Alert History View [#110123](https://github.com/grafana/grafana/pull/110123), [@laurenashleigh](https://github.com/laurenashleigh)
- **Alerting:** Enrichment Config Form (Enterprise)
- **Alerting:** Filter out private labels before writing recording rules [#109295](https://github.com/grafana/grafana/pull/109295), [@alexander-akhmetov](https://github.com/alexander-akhmetov)
- **Alerting:** List V2 - Add a group link to the rule list item [#108960](https://github.com/grafana/grafana/pull/108960), [@konrad147](https://github.com/konrad147)
- **Alerting:** List V2 - datasource icons for rules [#109033](https://github.com/grafana/grafana/pull/109033), [@konrad147](https://github.com/konrad147)
- **Alerting:** Load labels in drop-downs without blocking the interaction with the form inputs [#110648](https://github.com/grafana/grafana/pull/110648), [@soniaAguilarPeiron](https://github.com/soniaAguilarPeiron)
- **Alerting:** Mark Prometheus to Grafana conversion API as stable [#103499](https://github.com/grafana/grafana/pull/103499), [@alexander-akhmetov](https://github.com/alexander-akhmetov)
